ogTitle: Wylies Flat vs Wyndham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wylies Flat and Wyndham.
heading: Wylies Flat vs Wyndham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wylies Flat, New South Wales and Wyndham, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wyndham has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Wylies Flat (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wylies Flat or Wyndham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wylies Flat has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Wyndham scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wylies Flat scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Wyndham scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wylies Flat or Wyndham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wyndham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
